name: IPRouteAddInterface
title: IPRouteAddInterface
syntax: long IPRouteAddInterface( dword destination, dword mask, dword ifIndex); // form 1
description: With this function it is possible to add a static route to an interface to the routing table in the tcp/ip stack. Depending on the given mask (IPv4) or prefix (IPv6) a route to a single host or to a network is added (see example).
When such a route is installed the tcp/ip stack will send packets destined to this destination on the given interface.

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 destination address of the route.
